name: Quick & Easy Chocolate Brownies
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Hershey's semi-sweet baking chocolate, broken into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 9-inch square baking pan.
3. In a medium saucepan, combine sugar, evaporated milk, and butter. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture boils.
4. Remove from heat and add chocolate, stirring until melted. Beat in eggs and vanilla extract.
5. Stir in flour, baking soda, salt, and nuts (if desired) until well blended.
6. Pour into prepared pan.
7. Bake 30 to 35 minutes or until the brownies just begin to pull away from the sides of the pan.
8. Cool completely in the pan on a wire rack.
9. Cut into squares. Makes about 16 brownies.
